name: @taucad/replicad-opencascadejs
description: OpencascadeJS custom build for replicad (Tau fork: SIMD without relaxed-simd, native WebAssembly exceptions)
author: Steve Genoud <steve@sgenoud.com>

scripts.build: pnpm run generateConfig && pnpm run buildSingle && pnpm run buildMulti
scripts.buildSingle: cd build-config && docker run --rm -v "$(pwd):/src" -u "$(id -u):$(id -g)" ghcr.io/taucad/opencascade.js:alpha-single-threaded-arm64 link custom_build_single.yml && mkdir -p ../dist && mv replicad_single.js replicad_single.wasm replicad_single.d.ts replicad_single.js.symbols ../dist/ && cd -
scripts.buildMulti: cd build-config && docker run --rm -v "$(pwd):/src" -u "$(id -u):$(id -g)" ghcr.io/taucad/opencascade.js:alpha-multi-threaded-arm64 link custom_build_multi.yml && mkdir -p ../dist && mv replicad_multi.js replicad_multi.wasm replicad_multi.d.ts replicad_multi.js.symbols ../dist/ && cd -
